title: glaucium contortuplicatum
intro: Glaucium contortuplicatum, also known as the twisted poppy or hairy poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family, Papaveraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, derived from its alkaloids, particularly glaucine and protopine. The health benefits of Glaucium contortuplicatum include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as relieving respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, powder, or infusion, and is used to make herbal remedies for various ailments.
